rejectedSources.rejectionReason: The published download is not a healthy, reliably readable OOXML ZIP package and cannot serve as preservation evidence.

diagnostics.detail: python -m zipfile -t raised OSError: [Errno 22] Invalid argument while reading a local file header
Cannot read PPTX package: [Errno 22] Invalid argument
ppt/media/image7.png has ZIP CRC 0x3c0cc528 but the archive declares 0x9165b7ce; extraction exited 1

rejectedSources.rejectionReason: The OOXML package passes structural audits but this binary repeatedly terminates the tested Microsoft PowerPoint 16.0 process during both SaveAs and SaveCopyAs, including from a short local path.
diagnostics: Source-bound editing and exact package-preservation audit passed.
PowerPoint SaveAs failed with RPC server unavailable after the owned automation process exited.
PowerPoint SaveCopyAs reproduced the same failure from a short local temp path.
No PowerPoint round-trip credit is assigned to this fixture.
